articles.title: Canton man charged in killing of Cambridge DPW worker, DA says
articles.description:
Prosecutors say the suspect acted as a "lookout" in the shooting.

The post Canton man charged in killing of Cambridge DPW worker, DA says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Canton man charged in the shooting death of a Cambridge DPW worker.
Prosecutors claim the suspect acted as a lookout during the incident.
The case highlights ongoing concerns about public safety for city workers.

articles.title: Boston man dead after skydiving accident in Orange
articles.description:
Sunday's fatality marks the second death at Jumptown Skydiving in the past year.

The post Boston man dead after skydiving accident in Orange appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston man died in a skydiving accident at Jumptown Skydiving on Sunday.
This incident marks the second fatality at Jumptown in the past year.
Local skydiving regulations may face scrutiny following this tragic event.

articles.title: Darline Graham Nordone, sister of Lindsey Graham, chosen to fulfill remainder of his US Senate term
articles.description:
“Lindsey has always been there for me. And now, I will be there for him.”

The post Darline Graham Nordone, sister of Lindsey Graham, chosen to fulfill remainder of his US Senate term appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Darline Graham Nordone appointed to complete Lindsey Graham's US Senate term.
Lindsey Graham's sister will serve until the end of his term in 2026.
Boston residents may see shifts in local policies due to her appointment.

articles.title: Lindsay Clancy back in court for final hearing before murder trial
articles.description:
Clancy’s defense attorney said Monday her case is “probably the most emotionally disturbing and challenging” he’s seen in decades of trying cases.

The post Lindsay Clancy back in court for final hearing before murder trial appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lindsay Clancy's final pretrial hearing occurred on July 13, 2026, in Boston.
Defense attorney described the case as one of the most emotionally challenging in decades.
Residents are concerned about the implications of the trial on community safety.
